familyCompany.description1: Family values are very important to us and that is why we treat each customer as a member of our great bakers family. We're positive, honest, brave and determined to give our best and create only the best products.

question1.question: How do I use a bread proofing basket?
question1.answer: Lightly flour the basket to prevent sticking, then place the shaped dough inside, seam side up. Allow the dough to rise until ready, then gently turn the basket over onto a baking surface. The basket helps maintain the dough’s shape for a beautifully formed loaf.

question2.question: What are bread proofing baskets made of?
question2.answer: Yes, they are. For rattan baskets, you can tap out the excess flour and use a stiff brush to clean them. Cork baskets can even be washed under water. Liners also help keep them clean.

question3.question: Can I wash my bread proofing basket?
question3.answer: Absolutely! We can create a custom basket with your desired dimensions and shape. You can also add a custom engraving to the bottom. Just contact us to discuss your requirements.

question4.question: What size bread proofing basket should I choose?
question4.answer: Yes, all our products are certified to be food-safe according to European Parliament regulations (EC) No 1935/2004 and German LFGB standards.

hero.title: Products
hero.description: If you are looking for premium baking accessories, choose <deco>baskets crafted for rising and proofing bread dough.</deco> We offer durable, well-shaped products that help your loaves stay full, stable and beautifully formed.

rattan.title: Rattan bread proofing baskets
rattan.description: Handmade rattan baskets with excellent airflow and a natural texture that supports consistent proofing results.

cork.title: Cork bread proofing baskets
cork.description: Our cork line is easy to keep clean, keeps a stable shape and gives dough support during every proof.

bamboo.title: Bamboo fiber bread proofing baskets
bamboo.description: Lightweight and durable bamboo fiber baskets designed for daily use in bakeries and artisan kitchens.

plastic.title: Plastic bread proofing baskets
plastic.description: Practical polypropylene baskets that combine long service life with repeatable, professional results.

engraved.title: Engraved bread proofing baskets
engraved.description: Custom engraved options for rattan and cork products, ideal for bakeries that want a distinctive finish.

liners.title: Liners for bread proofing baskets
liners.description: Soft liners that simplify maintenance and support high-hydration dough handling across basket types.

rattan.heroDescription: Experienced bakers choose rattan to achieve a crisp surface, stable structure and a beautiful final shape.
rattan.introDescription: Rattan proofing baskets are available in multiple shapes and sizes for artisan and professional production. The material supports airflow during proofing and helps maintain a clean dough structure.
rattan.variantsDescription: Pick a shape that matches your loaf profile, hydration and cutting style.

context.2: Available in standard and custom dimensions.
context.3: Suitable for bakeries, restaurants and home professionals.

rattan.stagesTitle: Stages of working with <deco>a rattan basket</deco>

step1.title: Preparation
step1.body: Lightly moisten a new basket and dust it with flour before first use. For very hydrated dough, using a liner can improve handling.

step2.title: Proofing
step2.body: Place shaped dough inside, seam up, and proof in warm conditions. The basket helps keep structure while supporting even fermentation.

step3.title: Care
step3.body: After use, remove flour residue and dry the basket at room temperature. Store in a dry, ventilated space.

rattan.noVariantsDescription: We prepare rattan baskets in many shapes and dimensions, adapted to your baking workflow.

cork.heroDescription: Cork baskets are easy to maintain and deliver clean, repeatable proofing for daily bakery production.
cork.introDescription: Cork baskets are practical, washable and designed for stable everyday use. They are especially useful when easy cleaning and quick turnaround matter.
cork.variantsDescription: Select a cork shape that fits your dough style and production rhythm.

context.1: Easy to clean under running water.

cork.stagesTitle: Stages of working with <deco>a cork basket</deco>

step1.title: Preparation
step1.body: Dust the basket with flour before each use. For sticky dough, increase flour lightly on contact areas.

step2.title: Proofing
step2.body: Place shaped dough in the basket and proof until ready. Cork supports the dough form and keeps handling predictable.

step3.title: Care
step3.body: Rinse after use if needed and dry fully before storage. Keep baskets in a dry place between shifts.

cork.noVariantsDescription: Tell us what dimensions you need and we will help you select the right cork basket setup.

bamboo.heroDescription: Bamboo fiber models combine low weight with practical durability for frequent, high-volume use.
bamboo.introDescription: Bamboo fiber baskets are lightweight and reliable, giving bakeries a practical option for continuous work and standardized results.
bamboo.variantsDescription: Choose between key formats based on dough volume and final loaf shape.
bamboo.stagesTitle: Stages of working with <deco>a bamboo basket</deco>

step1.title: Preparation
step1.body: Apply a light flour layer before placing dough. Keep surfaces clean for repeatable daily use.

step2.title: Proofing
step2.body: Proof dough as usual based on your recipe and temperature. The basket helps keep the intended loaf form.

step3.title: Care
step3.body: Brush off flour and let the basket dry completely. Avoid storing in humid environments.

bamboo.noVariantsDescription: We can also prepare specific size ranges for your bakery and order volume.

plastic.heroDescription: Polypropylene baskets are robust and consistent, designed for bakeries that rely on repeatable output.
plastic.introDescription: Plastic baskets are made for stable, high-frequency production and are suitable for teams that need predictable process performance every day.
plastic.variantsDescription: Choose the format that best matches your target bread line and shaping process.
plastic.stagesTitle: Stages of working with <deco>a plastic basket</deco>

step1.title: Preparation
step1.body: Flour contact surfaces before loading dough. Keep a regular prep routine for stable output.

step2.title: Proofing
step2.body: Use your normal proofing time and conditions. The basket maintains shape and supports repeatability.

step3.title: Care
step3.body: Clean baskets after production and dry before stacking. Store away from heat sources.

plastic.noVariantsDescription: If you need custom dimensions or recurring supply, contact us and we will prepare an offer.

engraved.heroDescription: Engraved baskets are made to highlight your bakery identity with custom marks and personalized bottoms.
engraved.introDescription: Engraved products are made to order and developed with your brand requirements in mind. We can prepare custom motifs and basket setups for private labels.
engraved.variantsDescription: Engraved lines are configured case by case based on your brand and basket specifications.

context.2: Available for selected rattan and cork formats.

step1.title: Brief
step1.body: Share your logo, dimensions and preferred basket line. We verify technical fit and engraving direction.

step2.title: Prototype
step2.body: We align engraving depth and visual details with your team before approving final production.

step3.title: Production
step3.body: After approval we run production and quality checks, then prepare secure shipping.

engraved.noVariantsDescription: This line is prepared individually. We define shape, size and engraving details together before production.

liners.heroDescription: Our liner collection helps keep baskets cleaner and supports smooth dough release during handling.
liners.introDescription: Liners are designed to simplify basket care and support cleaner dough handling, especially in high-hydration recipes and high-turnover schedules.
liners.variantsDescription: Use liners matched to your basket type and size for best handling performance.

context.1: Improves hygiene and speeds up cleanup.

step1.title: Fit
step1.body: Choose a liner size matched to your basket geometry so the fabric sits evenly without folds.

step2.title: Proofing
step2.body: Place the liner, dust with flour if needed, then load shaped dough for proofing.

step3.title: Care
step3.body: Wash and dry liners according to your bakery routine to keep consistent hygiene standards.

liners.noVariantsDescription: Liners are tailored to basket type and size. Share your basket dimensions and we will match the right option.

hero.title: Let’s talk about your <deco>perfect basket</deco>
hero.description: Tell us what you need and we will prepare the best solution for your bakery, store or brand.

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: We usually get back to you within one business day.
form.notice: By sending this form, you agree that we can contact you regarding your inquiry.

ourProducts.title: Our <deco>products</deco>
ourProducts.description: We are producing bread proofing baskets, also called bannetons by our own hands, with the utmost care. For many years we have been improving in this very difficult craft to ensure the highest quality of our products. We're deeply engaged and passionate about our work

takingCare.title:
Taking care of the high quality

of our products

bakersFamily.title:
Join our bestbann

bakers family
bakersFamily.description: With the determination to continuous improvement of production processes and expanding the range of products, we are able to offer numerous types and sizes of bread proofing baskets, which we have already delivered to almost all continents, to more than 30 countries. We successfully cooperate with huge wholesalers, online stores, bakeries, hotels and restaurants, as well as with individual customers.
